nasb.text: Now the dread of the Lord was on all the kingdoms of the lands which were around Judah, so that they did not make war against Jehoshaphat.

esv.text: And the fear of the Lord fell upon all the kingdoms of the lands that were around Judah, and they made no war against Jehoshaphat.

cnv.text: 猶大地周圍的列國都懼怕耶和華，不敢和約沙法交戰。

ccb.text: 犹大周围的列国都惧怕耶和华，不敢与约沙法争战。
